title: Sony Gets Conditional OK for US-Based Stablecoin Bank
snippet: Sony Bank has received conditional approval to launch a U.S.-based stablecoin bank. title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
snippet: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

title: Nium acquires crypto wallet Cypher
snippet: Nium, the global leader in cross-border payments infrastructure, today announced the acquisition of Cypher, a crypto-native non-custodial wallet and issuing company.

title: Sony Bank wins US regulatory approval for stablecoin trust bank

title: PayPal seeks to increase use of PYUSD stablecoin with native issuance on Polygon
snippet: The company said its stablecoin will now be issued natively on Polygon, in addition to becoming available through Polygon's Open Money Stack.

title: Aave Labs rolls out Stable Vaults, offering predictable stablecoin yield aimed at mainstream users
snippet: Stable Vaults will continuously “optimize capital allocation” across DeFi yield strategies, like Aave V3 and V4 markets.

title: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
snippet: Trump's embrace of stablecoins is pushing Brussels to expand its crypto law to non-EU issuers and tokenized payments, EU diplomats say.

title: Nodu receives MiCA and Payment Institution licences from the Bank of Latvia
snippet: Nodu, the stablecoin payment infrastructure company, has been granted two licences by Latvijas Banka (the Bank of Latvia): a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) licence under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), and a payment institution licence.

title: Banks to pilot live transactions on Swift's blockchain-based shared ledger
snippet: Seventeen banks from six countries are preparing to pilot live transactions on Swift's interoperable blockchain-based shared ledger, using tokenised deposits for 24/7 payment availability and better liquidity efficiency.

title: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
snippet: The Bank of Korea reiterated its call for bank-led won stablecoin issuance while advancing deposit token pilots, as issuer rules remain a sticking point in South Korea’s digital asset bill.

title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
snippet: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

title: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
snippet: Revolut said USDT support remains unchanged outside EEA and Switzerland as it winds down the stablecoin offering in selected European markets.

title: Volt enables Profee wallet top-ups via USDC

title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
snippet: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

title: Hyundai Card completes stablecoin cross-border remittance PoC
snippet: Hyundai Card and Hyundai Motor Company have completed preparations for stablecoin-based cross-border remittances at a level that could be deployed between overseas corporate entities, moving beyond a simple technical verification stage.
